voters.name: Ola
voters.comment: i just love them (was going to submit "car song" but audibled when i saw the orange warning)

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: This one kinda feels more funky than some of their other more ska stuff to me but I still like it!

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: A point because it is indeed ska but I'm confirmed Cat Empired out for sure now. I know it's been a bit since they last showed up but not long enough for me apparently.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: This whole album is apparently beach vibes In my opinion too, since I picked a song from the same album 😂 One of my other favs from them I considered submitting was How to Explain. But Days Like These definitely has positive beach vibes. "I'm alive, I'm alive, I'm alive, I'm alive!" ❤️

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: Wasn't sure about the vibes because I hadn't listened to Cat Empire in a while. It's definitely a more 90's Sugar Ray style vibe but it went down smooth.

voters.name: Rose
voters.comment: So this is the famous cat empire I've heard so much about.

voters.name: [Left the League]
voters.comment: It is my personal policy to not award  points to multiple songs from the same artist and, regretfully I thought The Chariot fit the beach theme slightly better. Definitely looking forward to hearing more from this band though!

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: Found myself singing along to this one a couple days ago so it's gotta get a couple votes.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: You know you have at least one vote from me for The Cat Empire! Love the uplifting lyrics on this one. "Lord unbind my feet / Let me mingle with the good people we meet"  🎵P.S. I was listening to this near Owen and he laughed and said, "That guy has a funny voice, right?" lol I guess he kinda does, buddy

voters.name: Ola
voters.comment: looooove this song. a staple on my senior spring semester "don't have a mental breakdown" playlist.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Heyo this was maybe the first song by the Cat Empire you put on a mixed CD for me, Sarah!! Love this one

voters.name: Amanda
voters.comment: Yes I do love this one. I think just need a break.

voters.name: Rick
voters.comment: The bond vibes are really strong and appreciated.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: The very beginning of this made me think of Frozen 2 (lol if you know, you know)I really like the vibes of this though! Love the lyrics, so true that hearing a song brings you back to where you were when you first heard it

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: I keep getting the chorus stuck in my head so it has to get a vote, such a cool sound as well.

voters.name: Steve
voters.comment: Very good lyrics in this one! I must say, I agree. A good song always lives on

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: Love Saint Motel so much, and this is a really good one!

voters.name: Mike
voters.comment: I always love Saint Motel so this is cheating.

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: I'm going to forever be gun shy about submitting another Saint Motel because I feel like everyone's skeptical about voting for them after A Good Song Never Dies. 😅

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: I adore this song and it is constantly stuck in my head 10/10 excellent pick and I'm upset that I didn't think of it first

voters.name: Steve
voters.comment: I listened to this playlist while driving home from Dayton over the weekend, and this song came on just as I was getting to the hustle and bustle of Columbus. I felt like a badass grooving to this with my sunglasses on, merging across all of the crazy traffic.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: lolz I didn't even realize that's what they said! The brass part is the part that gets stuck in my head, love a good trumpet melody

voters.name: Mike
voters.comment: Hey that's my type too!

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: I'm sure this was already submitted, but a little suspicious after I just posted in chat that the last Saint Motel song was a unanimous winner :D

voters.name: Ola
voters.comment: mariachi version of this song also a delight fwiw
